rule: hit = (kw>=2) OR (sem>=0.7) OR (func>=0.7); independent scoring per result
candidate_summary: XYLEM-TENSION secondary tension stream initialized at output, propagating backward through layers via weighted alpha-cohesion in forward pass; concatenated with each layer's input.

results_analysis.title: Transformer-based Encoder-Decoder Models
results_analysis.reason: kw>=2 (top-down + output-feature flow); sem>=0.7; func>=0.7. Encoder-decoder cross-attention provides top-down output-to-input feature flow analogous to the candidate's secondary-stream concept.

results_analysis.title: UCTransNet: Rethinking Skip Connections via Channel Transformer (AAAI 2022)
results_analysis.reason: kw>=2; sem>=0.7; func>=0.7. UCTransNet redesigns skip connections as channel-wise transformer cross-attention — same secondary-stream augmentation pattern as candidate.

results_analysis.title: Comprehensive Review of U-Net Variants
results_analysis.reason: sem>=0.7 triggers hit. Survey of skip-connection / multi-resolution U-Net variants overlapping with secondary-stream augmentation idea.

results_analysis.title: UNet++: Redesigning Skip Connections
results_analysis.reason: kw>=2; sem>=0.7; func>=0.7. UNet++ dense nested skip connections provide multi-stream secondary-information flow analogous to candidate's tension stream concatenation.

results_analysis.title: Optimal Signal Propagation in ResNets via Residual
results_analysis.reason: kw>=2; sem>=0.7; func>=0.7. Optimal alpha-scaled residual signal propagation directly matches candidate's weighted α-cohesion blend principle.

results_analysis.title: Residual Connections Harm SSL Abstract Feature Learning
results_analysis.reason: kw<2, sem<0.7, func<0.7. SSL critique of residual; no specific overlap with secondary-stream / α-cohesion mechanism.

results_analysis.title: Learning to Skip the Middle Layers of Transformers
results_analysis.reason: kw<2, sem<0.7, func<0.7. Selective middle-layer skipping is different mechanism from secondary tension stream.

results_analysis.title: Transformers Get Stable: End-to-End
results_analysis.reason: kw<2, sem<0.7, func<0.7. Training stability work; no specific overlap with backward-stream-in-forward-pass mechanism.

verdict_sentence: Candidate FAILS novelty: 5 of 8 retrieved results trigger hits (4 kw>=2, 5 sem>=0.7, 4 func>=0.7) across multiple distinct effect clusters (encoder-decoder top-down flow, UCTransNet/UNet++ skip-connection redesign, alpha-scaled ResNet signal propagation), far exceeding the threshold of 1; the candidate's three claimed novel components (secondary stream, α-weighted blend, output-initialized propagation) each individually map to established mechanisms in the prior art.
